skill1.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends. Affects all shotgun-wielding allies. ATK ▲ 13% of the skill user's ATK x stack count of Precious Moments for 15 sec.
skill1.note: 39% = 13% × 3 stacks baked to max. Caveat: ramp reaches ~2 stacks by FB end (over-credits ~13% casterATK); fires on EVERY team FB end even rotations she did not burst (0 stacks in multi-B2 comps).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when Happy Memories takes effect. Affects self. Snapshots of Youth: Normal Attack Damage Multiplier ▲ 10% continuously, stacks up to 3 time(s).
skill1.note: 30% = 10% × 3 stacks. Trigger proxied from 'when Happy Memories takes effect' to burstCast (MM start). rampSec 11 approximates the 2/4/6-shot phase ramp; rests on ⚑1.5 pulls/s SG cadence.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends. Affects self. Removes Making Memories. Removes Snapshots of Youth.
skill1.note: Mode cleanup — non-damage. Buff expiry is handled implicitly by durationSec 11 lapse on the self-buff blocks.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when performing normal attacks while in Making Memories status. Affects self. Effect varies according to the number of attacks. Only one effect is triggered at a time. Resets when Making Memories is removed.
skill2.where: skill2[1] (self-buff block) + skill1[1] (Snapshots) via rampSec 11 + durationSec 11
skill2.note: Phase-counter cycling (2→4→6→2→…) approximated as linear ramp 0→cap over 11s. Reset handled by durationSec 11 lapse. 'One at a time' cycling is averaged into the ramp. Documented in caveat 1.
In-window reload — non-damage QoL. Adds ~3-5 window shots (COLD direction, partially masks ramp over-credit). Documented in caveat 3.

skill2.kitLine: Four times: Happy Memories: Number of pellets ▲ 1 continuously. Stacks up to 3 times.
skill2.note: +3 pellets on 10-pellet base ≈ +30% normal damage (additive approx). True multiplicative pellet×snapshot interaction is ~1.69x vs modeled ~1.6x — under-counts ~5% (COLD). Documented in note.

skill2.kitLine: Six times: Precious Moments: ATK ▲ 2.49% continuously. Stacks up to 3 times.
Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects all shotgun-wielding allies (except self). Attack Damage ▲ 55% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0]: burstCast → alliesOfWeapon SG excludeSelf → attackDamagePct 55, 10s
skill2.note: Kit-faithful: weapon-typed target with excludeSelf. Fixed 2026-07-16 from alliesOfClass Attacker (which silently ignored excludeSelf).

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Making Memories. Function: Enhances attack capabilities.
burst.where: burst[0]: burstCast → self, durationSec 11 on both buffs
burst.note: MM status modeled implicitly via burstCast trigger + 11s duration (spans burst → FB exit). No separate mode/resource config. Keyed to OWN burstCast, not fullBurstEnter — correct per owner confirmation (MM only on her own burst, not any team FB).
Kit-faithful value. 'Continuously' = permanent until MM removal; 11s duration matches MM window.
In-window reload — non-damage QoL. Adds ~2 window shots (COLD direction). Documented in caveat 3.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 554.4% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage.

documentedConfounds.text: rampSec 11 rests on ⚑1.5 pulls/s SG cadence estimate; a focus recording refines it
documentedConfounds.why: If true SG cadence differs from 1.5 pulls/s, the ramp timing is wrong — faster cadence reaches cap sooner (more HOT), slower cadence means less ramp coverage (less HOT). Unmeasured.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 39% (=13% × 3 Precious Moments stacks) at FB end assumes 3 stacks; ramp arithmetic reaches ~2 by FB end
documentedConfounds.why: Over-credits ~13% casterATK to all SG allies every FB end. At 2 stacks the correct value is 26%, not 39%.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 block fires on EVERY team FB end even on rotations she did not burst (0 stacks in reality — multi-B2 comps over-credit)
documentedConfounds.why: In multi-B2 teams, she may not burst every rotation. The fullBurstEnd trigger fires regardless, granting 39% casterATK from 0 stacks. Over-credits in any comp with another B2.

documentedConfounds.text: In-window reloads (Reload 6 at 2-hit phase; Reload 2 at burst) are unmodeled — they add ~3-5 window shots
documentedConfounds.why: More shots in-window = more damage. Skipping them under-counts her real output, partially masking the ramp/stack over-credit (HOT confounds above).

documentedConfounds.text: Happy Memories +3 pellets modeled as additive normalAttackPct 30; true multiplicative pellet×snapshot interaction is ~1.69x vs modeled ~1.6x (~5% under-count)
documentedConfounds.why: Additive approximation under-counts the compound pellet bonus. Small (~5%) but structurally biased COLD.

documentedConfounds.text: F4 REFUTES the 'pellet/Snapshots double-count' premise — distinct buffs; additive model UNDER-counts ~5% vs true multiplicative. Real HOT cause: F1 stack ramp baked to max + F2 S1 stacks baked
documentedConfounds.why: The rampSec 11 fix (theme 3, 2026-07-17) addresses F1/F2. Board moved from 1.88→1.132. Residual HOT attributed to SG per-unit pellet landing mechanics (unmodeled per-pellet hit resolution).

authorIntentSummary: The override models Arcana: Fortune Mate as a whole-kit steady-state representation of her Making Memories mode: burst grants MM (crit rate 20.09% + attack damage 29.99%) plus a 554.4% nuke, keyed to her OWN burstCast with 11s duration spanning burst→FB exit. Phase-counter stack buffs (Snapshots normalAttackPct 30, Happy-Memories pellets as normalAttackPct 30, Precious Moments atkPct 7.47) use rampSec 11 linear ramps replacing the prior baked-to-max encoding, with per-window reset via duration lapse. Key approximations: pellet bonus as additive normalAttackPct (under-counts ~5%), rampSec from unmeasured 1.5 pulls/s SG cadence, S1 39% casterATK baked to 3 stacks (ramp reaches ~2). Known-not-yet-faithful: in-window reloads skipped, S1 over-fires on non-burst rotations in multi-B2 comps. Board 1.132 HOT (n=1); residual attributed to SG per-unit pellet landing mechanics.
